Frequently Asked Questions
1. Rajasthan RSSB Common Eligibility Test CET (Graduate Level) Online Form 2026 Start Date?
The online application process started on 04 July 2026.
2. Rajasthan RSSB Common Eligibility Test CET (Graduate Level) Exam Date 2026?
The Examination will be conducted in 01-03 December  2026 .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Rajasthan RSSB Common Eligibility Test CET (Graduate Level) Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Rajasthan RSSB CET Graduate Level Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. Rajasthan RSSB Common Eligibility Test CET (Graduate Level) Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Rajasthan RSSB Common Eligibility Test CET (Graduate Level) Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 02 August 2026..
6. What is the last date to Pay Exam fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 02 August  2026 .
7. How can I apply for Rajasthan RSSB Common Eligibility Test CET (Graduate Level) Exam?
Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result®
tables: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) Common Eligibility Test CET Graduate Level 2026 :  Apply Online

Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has released the notification for Common Eligibility Test (CET) Graduate Level 2026. Candidates who are interested in this RSSB CET (Degree Graduate Level) Recruitment 2026 can apply online from 24 June 2026 to 23 July 2026 . Read the notification for eligibility, age limit, qualification, selection procedure, exam details, application fee and all other information before applying online.

Application Fees General / OBC CL / Other State : 600 /- OBC / MBC / EWS / SC / ST / PH (Rajasthan) : 400 /- Correction Charge : 300/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / Online Only.
RSSB CET Graduate Level Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation as per RSSB CET Graduate Level Secondary Level 2026 Rules.
